2028895839389925664.full_text:
ICC has confirmed that the 2026 T20 World Cup has already outperformed the entire 2024 edition on https://t.co/z8U6cXhlE1 and the knockouts haven’t even begun yet.

In terms of digital reach, the growth is massive. Unique users have increased by 28%, while total minutes watched have surged by 56% compared to the same stage of the 2024 tournament.

Even before the business end, engagement levels have broken previous records, a clear sign that global interest in the tournament is scaling faster than ever.
